allow: Bash(ls backend/voice_agent.py backend/config.py backend/sounds/ backend/photos/ frontend/src/components/SubtitleBar.* frontend/src/components/UserSpeechBubble.*)
Bash(python -c "import ast; ast.parse\(open\('main.py'\).read\(\)\); print\('main.py OK'\); ast.parse\(open\('voice_agent.py'\).read\(\)\); print\('voice_agent.py OK'\)")

Bash(python -c "import ast; ast.parse\(open\('main.py', encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\)\); print\('main.py OK'\); ast.parse\(open\('voice_agent.py', encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\)\); print\('voice_agent.py OK'\)")

Bash(python -c "import ast; ast.parse\(open\('main.py', encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\)\); print\('main.py OK'\); ast.parse\(open\('voice_agent.py', encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\)\); print\('voice_agent.py OK'\); ast.parse\(open\('notification.py', encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\)\); print\('notification.py OK'\)")
Bash(python -c "import ast; [ast.parse\(open\(f, encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\)\) or print\(f'{f} OK'\) for f in ['main.py','voice_agent.py','notification.py','pairing.py','config.py']]")
